summary: M440 — True FTL diamond grid. ZONE_PROFILES table assigns each zone a (length, height) — Act 1a 5×3, Act 1b 6×3, Act 2a 6×4 etc. Column row-counts follow profile[c]=min(H,c+1,L-c) for a clean 1→2→3→4→3→2→1 taper. Adjacent columns differ by at most 1 row, so edges can only step ±1 row vertically — no jumps over center rows. Filler combat nodes inserted automatically when the authored trunk is shorter than the grid. Y range clamped to [0.10,0.84] so node labels stop getting cut off at the bottom edge. Removed the M406 detangle pass that was nudging snapped nodes back off-grid (root cause of the 'Shady Wanderer jumps to top row' bug). Verified across 12 act zones: zero >1-row jumps, zero backwards edges, zero degree-cap violations, zero broken exits.
